codeReview.summary: The implementation matches the feature requirements: Ethereum default token pair was updated to USDC -> crvUSD in src/config.ts, default amount was changed from 1000 to 1 in src/server.ts, and existing default application flow (applyDefaults on initialization and chain change) continues to enforce per-chain defaults while preserving URL param override behavior.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit ad15d77 diff. Changes are scoped correctly to the requested default amount/token behavior and satisfy expected behavior/validation assertions for default amount, Ethereum defaults, non-Ethereum defaults, chain-switch defaults, and URL override precedence.
